summary: Added near-resolution confidence suppressor to recommendation_api.py. When entry-side cost is near-zero (< 0.10), action is set to NO_TRADE and confidence is capped at 0.0.

implementation.entry_price_check: Uses edges['p_cost_yes'] and edges['p_cost_no'] for accuracy
implementation.confidence_handling: Confidence = 0.0 when suppressed by hard gate; reduced by suppressor for soft gate

changes_made: Added _suppress_confidence_for_extreme_prices() function (soft penalty for extreme ask prices)
Added near-resolution hard gate that blocks trades when entry cost < threshold
Gate checks both BUY_YES (edges['p_cost_yes']) and BUY_NO (edges['p_cost_no'])
Enhanced gate_reasons to include actual trigger prices for diagnostics
Dual mechanism: soft suppression + hard gate for defense-in-depth

verification.logic_placement: After edge calculation, before final recommendation assembly
verification.test_coverage: Covers both entry sides and includes detailed logging

rationale: When market prices are at extremes (near 0 or 1), market certainty is high and model edge is less meaningful. Prevents low-confidence and suppressed recommendations in these zones.
notes: Implementation follows NEAR_RESOLUTION_CONFIDENCE_SANITY_AUDIT_001. Execution layer should also implement MARKET_PRICE_SANITY_GATE_001 for defense-in-depth.
next_steps: Monitor shadow recommendations for near_resolution_suppressor gate_reasons to validate frequency and price distribution.
